request.message: Signal distribution route for pragma.trading via Pyrimid catalog. Repro command: npm run pyrimid:signals. Evidence: output/pyrimid-signal-distribution.json identifies onchain_0x03151e_2 at $0.50 with 5000 bps affiliate share, estimated $0.25 USDC commission per routed call. Base USDC wallet: 0x66890857dc33d5066c28aadbeb7cd078f50799a3. This is distribution-ready and does not claim completed revenue until a non-self routed payment is verified.
